#### Unit 31.3 — `app/api/v1/cron/digest-send` route + `vercel.json` + `subscriber.lastDigestSentAt` migration + 23 tests (707/62); realizes ADR-0022 D-A/D-B/D-C/D-D/D-F + D-10/D-13; first Vercel Cron infra; first `vercel.json`; first migration cluster since Phase 15-16

- Fourth Phase-31 unit; **largest unit of Phase 31**. Realizes ADR-0022 **D-A** (Vercel Cron runtime via new top-level `vercel.json`) + **D-B** (weekly Monday 00:00 UTC schedule `0 0 * * 1`) + **D-C** (per-domain × per-subscriber nested send loop) + **D-D** (`CRON_SECRET` bearer-token + `vercel-cron` header belt-and-suspenders auth) + **D-F** (per-row try/catch + log + skip; no retry queue Phase 31) + **D-10** (`subscriber.lastDigestSentAt` column extension via migration `0007_subscriber_last_digest_sent_at.sql`) + **D-13** (`vercel.json` `crons` shape). **Test count 684/61 → 707/62** (+23 / +1 file Δ from Unit 31.2; 8 `checkCronAuth` tests + 4 `startOfCurrentIsoWeekUtc` tests + 11 `runDigestSend` tests). **First Load JS shared chunk = 103 kB UNCHANGED** (42nd consecutive unit at 103 kB; Phase 9-31 invariant preserved); **middleware 160 kB UNCHANGED**; all page bundles UNCHANGED. **Dynamic page+API routes 11 → 12** (+1: `/api/v1/cron/digest-send`).
- **`vercel.json`** (NEW; top-level config file): **first `vercel.json` in project history**. Single-entry `crons` array per ADR-0022 D-13: `{ path: "/api/v1/cron/digest-send", schedule: "0 0 * * 1" }` (Monday 00:00 UTC weekly per D-B). Includes `$schema` pointer for editor IntelliSense. Future cron jobs (Phase 32+ stale-token cleanup B.15 item 4; retry queue) extend this array.
- **`lib/db/schema.ts`** (modified): adds `lastDigestSentAt` integer nullable `timestamp_ms` column to the `subscribers` table per ADR-0022 D-10. **DB table count UNCHANGED at 7** (column extension, not new table). Doc-comment block extended documenting the Phase-31 inheritance + "first migration cluster since Phase 15-16" + "first migration that extends an existing table from a prior phase in project history" framing.
- **`lib/db/migrations/0007_subscriber_last_digest_sent_at.sql`** (NEW): generated via `pnpm db:generate` (drizzle-kit auto-named `0007_giant_baron_zemo.sql`; renamed to project's meaningful-name convention; `_journal.json` tag updated). Single-line SQL: `ALTER TABLE \`subscriber\` ADD \`lastDigestSentAt\` integer;`. **Migration count 7 → 8**. **Second consecutive migration phase** since Phase 30 broke the 13-phase 0-migration streak = **first migration cluster since Phase 15-16** (mirrors Phase-15 `displayName`+`bio` → Phase-16 `imageOverride` series shape). **First migration that extends an existing table from a prior phase** in project history (prior new tables were always net-new in their introducing phase). **First ALTER on a Phase-30 table** — extends `subscriber` from 11 columns → 12 within 1-phase carryover.
- **`lib/cron/digest-send.ts`** (NEW; ~205 lines): cron driver per ADR-0022 D-C + D-D + D-F. **Three exports**:
  - **`checkCronAuth(headers, cronSecret)`** — pure function realizing ADR-0022 D-D belt-and-suspenders auth check. Both layers must pass: (1) `vercel-cron` header present; (2) `Authorization` header equals `Bearer ${cronSecret}` under constant-time comparison via `crypto.timingSafeEqual` (defends against token-comparison timing side-channels; mirrors Phase-30 `safeCompareTokens`). Returns `{ ok: true }` or `{ ok: false, reason: "missing_cron_secret_env" | "missing_vercel_cron_header" | "bad_authorization" }`.
  - **`startOfCurrentIsoWeekUtc(now)`** — pure function computing the Monday 00:00 UTC of the current ISO week. Used as the idempotency threshold per ADR-0022 D-10: subscriber rows whose `lastDigestSentAt >= startOfCurrentIsoWeekUtc(now)` are skipped (already received this week's digest; guards against Vercel Cron at-least-once delivery semantics + retries on 5xx).
  - **`runDigestSend(deps)`** — orchestrator with **fully injectable dependencies** (`buildDigestForDomain`, `getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain`, `renderDigestEmail`, `sendEmail`, `updateLastDigestSentAt`, `logError`, `now`, `domains`). Outer loop iterates taxonomy domains; per-domain `buildDigest`; empty-window skip per ADR-0022 D-F (no `items` → no inner loop); inner loop iterates verified subscribers opted into that domain; per-row idempotency check via `lastDigestSentAt`; per-row try/catch isolates send failures (one bad recipient does NOT halt the batch; failed rows do NOT update `lastDigestSentAt` so next week's cron retries naturally). Also catches `buildDigestForDomain` + `getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain` failures at the outer-loop level to isolate per-domain infrastructure errors. Returns `DigestSendResult { domains, skippedEmptyDomains, sent, failed, skippedAlreadySent, durationMs }` for Vercel dashboard observability + Q75 monitoring sub-step per ADR-0022 D-G.
- **`lib/cron/digest-send.test.ts`** (NEW; 23 tests across 3 describe blocks):
  - **`checkCronAuth` group (8 tests)**: ok-result for valid both-headers + matching secret; rejects `undefined` env var (`missing_cron_secret_env`); rejects empty-string env var (`missing_cron_secret_env`); rejects null `vercel-cron` header (`missing_vercel_cron_header`); rejects null `Authorization` header (`bad_authorization`); rejects wrong secret (`bad_authorization`); rejects non-Bearer scheme (`bad_authorization`); rejects length-mismatch without throwing (`bad_authorization`).
  - **`startOfCurrentIsoWeekUtc` group (4 tests)**: Monday self-returns midnight; Sunday walks back 6 days to prior Monday; Wednesday walks back 2 days; snaps to midnight UTC regardless of input time of day.
  - **`runDigestSend` group (11 tests)**: iterates domains × verified subscribers and sends one email per pair (2 domains × 2 subs = 4 sends); skips empty-window domains entirely + doesn't query subscribers for empty domains; skips subscribers already-sent-this-week per `lastDigestSentAt` idempotency; isolates per-row send failures via `result.error`; isolates per-row thrown exceptions; does NOT call `updateLastDigestSentAt` for failed sends; survives a failing `buildDigestForDomain` and continues; survives a failing `getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain` and continues; returns 0 sends when domains array empty; renders digest email with subscriber's unsubscribe token; sends emails with domain-titled subject line (`{title} — weekly digest`).
- **`app/api/v1/cron/digest-send/route.ts`** (NEW; ~75 lines): thin POST handler per ADR-0022. **First `app/api/v1/cron/` route prefix** in project history. **First scheduled-trigger API endpoint** in project history. **First production transactional email send loop** in project history (Phase 30 verify + welcome path was single-recipient-per-click; Phase 31 ships recurring multi-row loop bounded by Resend 3,000/month free-tier ceiling). All logic delegated to `lib/cron/digest-send`; route's job is (a) auth-check via `checkCronAuth`, (b) adapt production deps (`db` + Drizzle UPDATE + `sendEmail` + `buildDigest` + `renderDigestEmail` + `getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain` + `taxonomy.domains` + `SITE`) into `DigestSendDeps` shape, (c) return `DigestSendResult` JSON for Vercel dashboard observability + Q75 monitoring. **POST only** (Vercel Cron's HTTP method default); GET returns 405. Support email extracted from `EMAIL_FROM` env var via regex (mirrors Phase-30 verify route pattern). `logError` uses `console.error` (Vercel dashboard captures stderr; one ESLint disable comment for `no-console`).
- **`.env.example`** (modified): adds **Phase-31 `CRON_SECRET`** env-var block with documentation of: (a) shared-secret generation via `openssl rand -base64 32`; (b) Vercel production env vs `.env.local` dev override; (c) graceful degradation 401 + `missing_cron_secret_env` reason when unset (mirrors Q54 / Q73 / Q75 posture per ADR-0022 D-D); (d) link to Vercel docs on cron-job security. **Env count 11 → 12**.
- **§5.7 trigger (b) FIRES Phase 31** per ADR-0022 D-10: subscriber-row `lastDigestSentAt` column genuinely requires DB-side persistence for idempotency across Vercel Cron retries + function timeouts; in-memory dedup is not durable enough. §5.7 trigger (a) FIRED Unit 9.6 carried.
- **Class B item B.15 item 1 (weekly digest scheduler + send template) — CLOSED at Unit 31.3** (template half Unit 31.2 + scheduler+route+migration half Unit 31.3). **B.15 item count 5 → 4**.
- **Three-surface composition realized in production**: cron route adapts (a) `lib/digest/build-digest` Phase-5 `DigestPayload` builder + (b) `lib/email/sendEmail` Phase-30 Resend wrapper + (c) `lib/subscribers/getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain` Unit-31.2 selector + (d) `lib/email/templates/digest` Unit-31.2 template + (e) `lib/cron/digest-send` Unit-31.3 orchestrator. **Five-surface composition Phase 31** = three Phase 5/30 reuses + two Phase-31 new modules. **Zero new runtime dependencies Phase 31** (server-only Next.js + Drizzle + Resend; no React Email; no MJML; no event-driven runtime).
- **Architectural firsts shipped in this unit** (~10 firsts):
  - **First `vercel.json` top-level config file** in project history.
  - **First Vercel Cron infrastructure** in project history.
  - **First scheduled-trigger API endpoint** in project history.
  - **First `app/api/v1/cron/` route prefix** in project history.
  - **First `lib/cron/` infrastructure module** in project history.
  - **First production transactional email send loop** in project history.
  - **First multi-row INSERT-or-UPDATE loop bounded by external rate-limit ceiling** (Resend 3,000/month free tier; ~750-subscriber ceiling per ADR-0022 D-G).
  - **First migration that extends an existing table from a prior phase** (`subscriber` Phase 30 → `lastDigestSentAt` Phase 31; prior new tables were always net-new in their introducing phase).
  - **First non-zero-migration phase 2 phases in a row** = **first migration cluster since Phase 15-16** (Phase-15 `displayName`+`bio` → Phase-16 `imageOverride` precedent shape).
  - **First constant-time HTTP header comparison** in project history (`checkCronAuth` uses `crypto.timingSafeEqual` for `Bearer` token check; Phase-30 `safeCompareTokens` was for DB-token URL-path comparison).
  - **First fully-dep-injected loop driver with vi.fn-based test surface** (`runDigestSend` accepts 8-key `DigestSendDeps`; tests inject 8 mocks; production code path exercised end-to-end without touching SQLite or Resend). **Replaces the Phase-30 B.20 "DB-helper integration tests deferred" scope** for the digest-send path; the auth + loop logic is covered without live infrastructure.
- Smoke gates (code unit): `pnpm typecheck` clean; `pnpm test` → **707/707 across 62 vitest files** (+23 / +1 file Δ from Unit 31.2); `pnpm build` → ~659 prerendered pages + **12 dynamic page+API routes** (was 11; +1 `/api/v1/cron/digest-send` at 183 B / 103 kB First Load JS); **First Load JS shared chunk = 103 kB UNCHANGED** (42nd consecutive unit at 103 kB; Phase 9-31 invariant preserved); **middleware 160 kB UNCHANGED**; all page bundles UNCHANGED; `pnpm audit-content` → 0 errors / 6 warnings (Q32 baseline unchanged).
- **Files added**: `vercel.json` (NEW top-level config); `lib/cron/digest-send.ts` (NEW; ~205 lines); `lib/cron/digest-send.test.ts` (NEW; 23 tests); `app/api/v1/cron/digest-send/route.ts` (NEW; ~75 lines); `lib/db/migrations/0007_subscriber_last_digest_sent_at.sql` (NEW; 1 line ALTER).
- **Files modified**: `lib/db/schema.ts` (+1 column `lastDigestSentAt` + ~20-line doc block); `lib/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json` (+1 entry idx 7); `.env.example` (+`CRON_SECRET` block); `CHANGELOG.md` (this entry).
- **Parallel-curator awareness**: this unit touches NEW `vercel.json` top-level (HIGHEST collision risk per Phase-31 prep — no parallel infra thread observed; clean) + NEW `lib/cron/` directory (no collision) + NEW `app/api/v1/cron/` directory (no collision) + NEW migration file (no collision; sequential `idx` in journal) + MODIFIED `lib/db/schema.ts` (schema is single-source-of-truth; LOW collision absent another schema thread) + MODIFIED `lib/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json` (sequential entry; LOW collision absent another migration). Working tree clean at unit boundary.

#### Unit 31.2 — `lib/email/templates/digest.tsx` + `lib/subscribers/` selection helper + tests (684/61); realizes ADR-0022 D-C + D-E

- Third Phase-31 unit; code unit. Realizes ADR-0022 **D-C** (per-domain × per-subscriber send semantics — subscriber selector half) + **D-E** (`DigestPayload → HTML` plain template-literal string builder). **Test count 667/60 → 684/61** (+17 / +1 file Δ from Unit 31.1; 11 new digest template tests + 6 new selector pure-helper tests). **First Load JS shared chunk = 103 kB UNCHANGED** (41st consecutive unit at 103 kB; Phase 9-31 invariant preserved); **middleware 160 kB UNCHANGED**; all page bundles UNCHANGED. Dynamic page+API routes UNCHANGED at 11 (Unit 31.3 will add `/api/v1/cron/digest-send`).
- **`lib/email/templates/digest.tsx`** (NEW; ~95 lines): plain template-literal `DigestPayload → HTML` builder sibling to Phase-30 `verification.tsx` + `welcome.tsx`. **Consumes the same `DigestPayload` type Phase-5 `lib/digest/build-digest` emits** — type-level contract reused for RSS-side + email-side rendering parity. Mobile-friendly 600px max-width per ADR-0022 D-E. Header (domain title + week-range + item count) + items list (`renderItem` per `DigestItem`: ISO date + title-as-link + description) + footer (next-digest cadence reminder + unsubscribe link + support email). **Absolutize helper** (`absolutize`) normalizes relative `DigestItem.link` paths to full URLs via the existing `SITE` constant from `lib/site-url.ts` (Phase-8 Unit 8.5 extraction; email-client compat requires absolute URLs since relative `<a href>` in email body resolves against `mail.google.com` etc. not the project site). **Defensive HTML-escape** on all string fields via the same `escapeHtml` shape used in Phase-30 verify + welcome templates (defense-in-depth per ADR-0022 §15.5 reviewer-mode mindset (e) digest-template XSS guard — content-derived `DigestPayload` fields are server-trusted but escape-on-render keeps the template robust if future content sources widen). **Empty-items contract**: cron route's per-domain skip per ADR-0022 D-F means production never calls this template with `items.length === 0`; the template still renders a "no activity this week" placeholder as defense-in-depth (tests exercise this path).
- **`lib/email/templates/digest.test.tsx`** (NEW; 11 tests): coverage on (1) `<!DOCTYPE html>` prefix for email-client compat; (2) domain title in heading + footer; (3) each item's title + date + description rendered; (4) relative item links absolutized via `SITE`; (5) absolute item links preserved unchanged (no double-prefix); (6) unsubscribe URL in `href`; (7) `mailto:` link to support email; (8) HTML-escape defensive against `<script>` + `<img onerror>` XSS attempts in title + description; (9) empty-items payload renders "no activity" placeholder (no `<ul>` element); (10) singular "1 update" label when `itemCount === 1`; (11) plural "2 updates" label when `itemCount > 1`. Mirrors Phase-30 `welcome.test.tsx` + `verification.test.tsx` shape (5 tests each) but with broader XSS + absolutization + label-pluralization coverage given the wider input surface.
- **`lib/subscribers/index.ts`** (modified; +60 lines): adds **2 new exports** realizing ADR-0022 D-C subscriber-selection contract:
  - **`subscriberSubscribesToDomain(domainSubscriptionsJson, domain): boolean`** — pure helper. Returns `true` iff the given taxonomy domain ID is in the subscriber row's `domainSubscriptions` JSON column. Defensive: malformed JSON yields `false` (matches `parseDomainSubscriptions` empty-array contract); trims surrounding whitespace on the `domain` arg; empty-string arg returns `false`. **Kept separate from the DB helper** so the in-memory filter logic is unit-testable without a live DB or full Drizzle mock — mirrors the Phase-30 pure/DB split.
  - **`getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain(domain): Promise<Subscriber[]>`** — DB helper. SELECTs `status = 'verified'` rows from `subscriber`, filters in JS via `subscriberSubscribesToDomain`. **In-JS filter is acceptable Phase 31**: SQLite `JSON_EXTRACT` over a JSON-encoded string array is messy (no first-class JSON-array search); Phase-31 scale is bounded at ~750 subscribers by Resend 3,000/month free-tier ceiling per ADR-0022 D-G; index-scan optimization deferred Phase 32+ per ADR-0022 D-H if signal. Returns rows in DB-default order (cron-route consumer is order-independent — per-row idempotency via `lastDigestSentAt` guards double-sends regardless).
- **`lib/subscribers/index.test.ts`** (modified; +6 tests): coverage on `subscriberSubscribesToDomain` pure helper — (1) returns true for domain in list; (2) returns false for domain not in list; (3) returns false on malformed JSON; (4) returns false on empty / whitespace-only `domain` arg; (5) tolerates surrounding whitespace on `domain` arg; (6) returns false for empty subscription array. **DB-helper `getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain` tests** remain in B.20 deferred scope (live-DB or full-Drizzle-mock required; Phase-31 ships pure-function coverage that exercises the canonical-form + domain-match contracts).
- **Three-surface composition realized**: Unit 31.3 will compose (a) `lib/digest/build-digest` Phase-5 `DigestPayload` builder + (b) `lib/email/sendEmail` Phase-30 Resend wrapper + (c) `lib/subscribers/getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain` Unit-31.2 selector into the cron-route per-domain × per-subscriber send loop per ADR-0022 D-C. **Zero new runtime dependencies Phase 31** (server-only Next.js + Drizzle + Resend; no React Email; no MJML; no event-driven runtime).
- **Architectural firsts shipped in this unit**: **first `lib/email/templates/digest.tsx`** template + first **`DigestPayload`-shaped email template** (Phase-5 RSS-side `DigestPayload` type now consumed by email-side template; type-level contract preservation across two render targets — Phase 31 = first time the same `DigestPayload` shape is used for both RSS XML and email HTML); **first email template with content-derived item iteration** (Phase-30 verify + welcome templates had fixed-shape inputs — domain titles + URLs; Phase-31 digest template iterates variable-length `DigestItem[]`); **first email template with `SITE`-based absolutization** (Phase-30 templates received pre-built absolute URLs; Phase-31 builds absolute item links from relative `DigestItem.link` paths inside the template); **first `lib/site-url.ts` import in `lib/email/templates/`** (cross-module dependency: Phase-8 + Phase-31 surface coupling).
- **§5.7 trigger (b) cold this unit** — Unit 31.2 ships pure helpers + new template file + selector helper; **no schema changes**; **no migrations**. Unit 31.3 ships the `subscriber.lastDigestSentAt` column extension migration `0007_subscriber_last_digest_sent_at.sql` per ADR-0022 D-10.
- **Class B item B.15 item 1 (weekly digest scheduler + send template) — partial close at Unit 31.2** (template half realized); full close at Unit 31.3 (scheduler + cron route half).
- Smoke gates (code unit): `pnpm typecheck` clean; `pnpm test` → **684/684 across 61 vitest files** (+17 / +1 file Δ from Unit 31.1); `pnpm build` → ~659 prerendered pages + **11 dynamic page+API routes** UNCHANGED (Unit 31.3 adds the 12th); **First Load JS shared chunk = 103 kB UNCHANGED** (41st consecutive unit at 103 kB); **middleware 160 kB UNCHANGED**; all page bundles UNCHANGED; `pnpm audit-content` → 0 errors / 6 warnings (Q32 baseline unchanged).
- **Files added**: `lib/email/templates/digest.tsx` (NEW; ~95 lines); `lib/email/templates/digest.test.tsx` (NEW; 11 tests).
- **Files modified**: `lib/subscribers/index.ts` (+60 lines = 2 new exports); `lib/subscribers/index.test.ts` (+6 tests + 1 new import); `CHANGELOG.md` (this entry).
- **Parallel-curator awareness**: this unit touches NEW `lib/email/templates/digest.tsx` + `digest.test.tsx` (no collision) + MODIFIED `lib/subscribers/index.ts` + `index.test.ts` (LOW collision — Phase-30 surfaces extended additively; no parallel digest thread observed). Working tree clean at unit boundary.

#### Unit 31.1 — ADR-0022 weekly digest scheduler + send template (**22 ADRs**; Vercel Cron; weekly Monday 00:00 UTC; per-domain × per-subscriber loop; `CRON_SECRET` + `vercel-cron` header belt-and-suspenders; `subscriber.lastDigestSentAt` idempotency column; closes Phase-30 B.15 item 1 at 1-phase carryover)

- Second Phase-31 unit; docs-only. Authors **ADR-0022 weekly digest scheduler + send template** + THINK artifact + ADR README index update. **ADR count 21 → 22**. **ADR-0022 candidate slot claimed at 1-phase age** since ADR-0021 shipped Phase 30 — tied-tightest gap in project history with Phase 17→18 + 18→19 + 28→30 + 30→31 = **five 1-phase ADR-cycle intervals**.
- **Closes Phase-30 B.15 item 1 at 1-phase carryover** — tightest follow-on cadence mirrors Phase 21/23/25/27/29 verbatim. Closes the Phase-30 acceptance gate's "foundation-only weak UX without scheduler" boundary statement: Phase-30 subscribers signed up expecting weekly digests; ADR-0022 pins the architectural commitment that the Unit-31.2 + 31.3 code units realize.
- **Eight D-clauses pinned** (mirrors ADR-0021's 8-clause shape verbatim — second consecutive new-ADR phase to ship 8 D-clauses):
  - **D-A scheduler runtime** = **Vercel Cron** (rejects: GitHub Actions / Inngest / Trigger.dev / cron-job.org / in-process timers / external orchestrators; runtime-singleton principle mirrors ADR-0021 D-A's Resend singleton + ADR-0012 D-A's NextAuth.js singleton).
  - **D-B schedule** = **weekly Monday 00:00 UTC** via cron expression `0 0 * * 1` (closes per-unit deferred decision **D-9** Monday-fresh-week lean from prep doc; rejects: daily / bi-weekly / monthly / per-subscriber-preferred-day for Phase 31 minimum surface).
  - **D-C send semantics** = **per-domain × per-subscriber nested loop** (outer iterates taxonomy domains; inner iterates verified subscribers who opted into that domain; one email per (subscriber, domain) pair; rejects: per-subscriber × per-domain inverted loop / aggregated cross-domain single-email per subscriber for Phase 31; aggregation deferred Phase 32+ per D-H + Q76 sibling).
  - **D-D auth boundary** = **`CRON_SECRET` bearer-token + `vercel-cron` header belt-and-suspenders** (closes per-unit deferred decision **D-12**; constant-time `Authorization: Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}` comparison via `crypto.timingSafeEqual` mirroring Phase-30 `safeCompareTokens` + `vercel-cron` header presence check for defense-in-depth; rejects: path obscurity / `Authorization` only / `vercel-cron` only).
  - **D-E send template** = **`lib/email/templates/digest.tsx` plain template-literal string builder** (closes per-unit deferred decision **D-11**; sibling to Phase-30 `verification.tsx` + `welcome.tsx`; reuses `DigestPayload` type from Phase-5 `lib/digest/build-digest` verbatim; mobile-friendly 600px max-width; defensive HTML-escape on all string inputs; rejects: React Email + MJML + TSX server component for Phase 31; React Email deferred Phase 32+ per D-H if template count grows beyond ~5).
  - **D-F failure handling** = **per-row try/catch + structured log + skip; no retry queue Phase 31** (one bad recipient does NOT halt the batch; failed rows do NOT update `lastDigestSentAt` so next week's cron retries naturally; rejects: first-failure abort / synchronous in-week retry / DLQ; retry queue deferred Phase 32+ per D-H if reliability signal emerges via Q78 candidate).
  - **D-G free-tier rate-limit awareness** = **Resend 3,000/month documented + Q75 monitoring sub-step added** (free tier × weekly cadence = ~750 subscribers ceiling; cron-route response surfaces `sent: N` for observability; rejects: hard-cap in code for Phase 31; Q75 operational gate carries forward Phase 31+ with monitoring instruction).
  - **D-H Phase 32+ deferrals** enumerated (~15 items): retry queue / send analytics / per-subscriber preferred send-day / digest content customization / React Email / MJML / FR digest i18n / per-problem subscription / authenticated `users.id` link / cross-domain aggregated summary / admin curator UI / manual send-now override / Resend tier upgrade automation / row-level lock for concurrent-cron race / Resend bounce/complaint webhook handling / stale-token cleanup job (carries from ADR-0021 D-H Phase-31+ B.15 item 4).
- **Per-unit deferred decisions resolved in this ADR** (closes D-10 + D-11 + D-12 + D-13 from Phase-31 prep):
  - **D-10 idempotency strategy** = **`subscriber.lastDigestSentAt` column extension** via new migration `0007_subscriber_last_digest_sent_at.sql` (rejects: new `digest_send` audit table for Phase 31 — over-engineering for foundation phase, deferred Phase 32+ per D-H; rejects: stateless send-window key — fragile under Vercel Cron's at-least-once delivery + retry-on-5xx semantics). **Anticipated migration count 7 → 8 Unit 31.3**; **DB table count UNCHANGED at 7** (column extension, not new table); **second consecutive migration phase** since Phase 30 broke 13-phase 0-migration streak = **first migration cluster since Phase 15-16** (Phase-15 `displayName`+`bio` → Phase-16 `imageOverride` series shape).
  - **D-13 `vercel.json` `crons` config shape** = single-entry `crons` array; `path: "/api/v1/cron/digest-send"`; `schedule: "0 0 * * 1"` (Monday 00:00 UTC weekly). **`vercel.json` is a NEW top-level config file Phase 31** — **first `vercel.json` config file in project history** confirmed.
- **§5.7 trigger (b) FIRES Phase 31** via D-10 column-extension migration (subscriber-row `lastDigestSentAt` column genuinely requires DB-side persistence for idempotency across Vercel Cron retries; in-memory dedup is not durable enough). §5.7 trigger (a) FIRED Unit 9.6 carried.
- **Phase-31 architectural firsts pinned by this ADR** (~10 firsts):
  - **First Vercel Cron infrastructure** in project history.
  - **First scheduled-trigger API endpoint** (Unit 31.3 will realize via `app/api/v1/cron/digest-send/route.ts`).
  - **First `app/api/v1/cron/` route prefix** in project history.
  - **First `vercel.json` top-level config file** in project history (Unit 31.3).
  - **First production transactional email send loop** (Phase 30 shipped verification + welcome single-recipient-per-click path; Phase 31 ships recurring multi-row loop bounded by Resend 3,000/month free-tier ceiling).
  - **First multi-row INSERT-or-UPDATE loop bounded by external rate-limit ceiling** in project history.
  - **First non-zero-migration phase 2 phases in a row** (Phase 30 + Phase 31; **first migration cluster since Phase 15-16** = 14-phase gap from last cluster; mirrors Phase-15-16 series shape).
  - **First migration that extends an existing table from a prior phase** (Phase 30 `subscriber` table → Phase 31 `lastDigestSentAt` column extension; prior new tables were always net-new in their introducing phase).
  - **First ADR to close 4 per-unit deferred decisions in a single ADR** (D-10 + D-11 + D-12 + D-13 from prep) — exceeds Phase-30 ADR-0021's 3 per-unit closures.
  - **Five consecutive 1-phase ADR-cycle intervals** (Phase 17→18 + 18→19 + 28→30 + 30→31 = four prior; ADR-0022 adds the fifth) — confirms 1-phase cadence as a recurring (not exceptional) shape.
- **ADR-0021 inheritance pattern**: ADR-0022 is the direct production-send realization of ADR-0021 D-H rows 1 + 2 ("weekly digest email send" + "Vercel Cron scheduler"). ADR-0021 D-F **will receive an APPEND-not-EDIT Phase-31 cross-ref note in Unit 31.4** documenting the `digest.tsx` template addition (third APPEND-pattern ADR D-clause carry-forward after ADR-0013 D-F's 2 APPENDs + ADR-0018 D-G's 3 APPENDs).
- **Q-promotion candidates anticipated** for Unit 31.4 (0-2 net opens per prep doc D-9): **Q77 operational** (Vercel Cron production setup + `CRON_SECRET` provisioning + first-week execution monitoring; mirrors Q54 + Q73 + Q75 operational-gate shape) + **Q78 architectural** (digest-send analytics / observability Phase 32+; couples to D-F + D-G + D-H deferrals; Resend webhook integration candidate). Will land in Unit 31.4 hygiene if signal warrants.
- **Reuses Phase-5 + Phase-30 surfaces verbatim** (three-surface composition): `lib/digest/build-digest` Phase-5 `DigestPayload` builder (type-level contract reused for digest template input); `lib/email/sendEmail` Phase-30 Resend wrapper (provider-isolated transactional send); `lib/subscribers/` Phase-30 row management (extended Unit 31.2 with `getVerifiedSubscribersForDomain(domain)` selector). Zero new runtime dependencies anticipated Phase 31.
- **Reversibility commitments documented**: switching schedulers Phase 32+ is `vercel.json` removal + auth-check rewrite (single-file impact; cron route + send loop body survive verbatim). Switching to event-driven runtime (Inngest / Trigger.dev) is `crons` removal + new ADR. Switching email providers remains ADR-0021 D-A's single-file rewrite. **Three reversibility layers preserved** in the Phase-31 send-loop stack.
- **Known limitations documented in ADR** (3 items): (1) **Vercel Cron at-least-once delivery semantics** = theoretical double-send race window under concurrent cron invocations (mitigated by SQLite-serialized per-row UPDATE; row-level lock pattern deferred Phase 32+); (2) **No retry queue** Phase 31 = chronic per-recipient failure silently retries weekly until manual investigation (Resend webhook integration deferred Phase 32+ via Q78 candidate); (3) **Resend free-tier ceiling at 3,000/month** = subscriber list bounded at ~750 (curator manual upgrade or provider switch via Q75 monitoring sub-step before ceiling hit).
- Smoke gates (docs-only): `pnpm audit-content` → 0 errors / 6 warnings (Q32 baseline since Phase 2; unchanged through every Phase 3-31 unit); typecheck / test / build untouched since no source files modified.
- **Files added**: `docs/adr/0022-weekly-digest-scheduler.md` (NEW; ~445 lines — Context + 6 Considered Options + 8 D-clauses + 11 Positive + 7 Negative consequences + 10 Cross-references); `docs/thinking/31.1-adr-0022-weekly-digest-scheduler.md` (NEW; THINK artifact).
- **Files modified**: `docs/adr/README.md` (ADR index row 0022 + chronological prose paragraph extended for ADR-0022); `CHANGELOG.md` (this entry).
- **Parallel-curator awareness**: this unit docs-only; touches NEW ADR file (no collision) + NEW THINK file (no collision) + MODIFIED ADR README (append-only row + paragraph; low collision) + MODIFIED CHANGELOG (append-only entry under `### Phase 31` section opened Unit 31.0; low collision). No parallel-session activity observed during Phase 31 work to date.
- THINK artifact: `docs/thinking/31.1-adr-0022-weekly-digest-scheduler.md`.

#### Unit 31.0 — Phase 31 prep (weekly digest scheduler + send template via ADR-0022 candidate; B.15 item 1 carryover at 1-phase age; twenty-sixth "Continue" override)

- First Phase-31 unit; docs-only. Opens Phase 31 (**twenty-second NON-§13 phase**). Mirrors Phase-12 through Phase-30 phase-prep patterns. **§13 ledger CLOSED** at Unit 9.9 (carried unchanged through Phases 10-30); Phase 31 inferred-not-§13 like its twenty-one predecessors.
- **Phase 31 sign-off granted via "Continue" override** in the unit-rhythm rhythm (**twenty-sixth invocation** of this pattern). §12 cardinal rule satisfied; first-thread D-1 recommendation overridable into Unit 31.1.
- **Recommended thread: B.15 item 1. Weekly digest scheduler + send template** (D-1) via new **ADR-0022**. Closes **Phase-30 B.15 item 1** at **1-phase carryover** — mirrors the Phase 21/23/25/27/29 tightest-follow-on close pattern verbatim. Closes the Phase-30 acceptance gate's "foundation-only weak UX without scheduler" boundary statement: Phase-30 subscribers can opt in but won't receive digest emails until Phase 31+ ships the scheduler — Phase 31 closes that gap. **First new ADR since Phase 30** = 1-phase ADR-cycle interval (tied-tightest gap in project history with Phase 17→18 + 18→19 + 28→30). **ADR-0022 candidate slot claimed at 1-phase age** (opened Phase 30 by ADR-0021 landing). Anticipated phase shape: **6 units** (mirrors Phase 19 + 28 + 30 new-ADR rhythm; fourth consecutive new-ADR phase at 6 units).
- **Tradeoffs flagged**: passing on **A. Q68 expansion content moderation** (~3-5 units; 10+ phase carryover; tighter follow-on close wins) + **D. Markdown evolution ADR** (Q72 + Phase-29 B.14; no demand signal) + **G. Q64 per-user privacy opt-out** (~3 units; breaks just-restarted 0-migration cycle pre-emptively) + **J/K-other** (3-phase age; Phase 32+) + **L/M** (small scope; not closing strongest signal).
- **Reuses Phase 5 + 30 surfaces verbatim**: `lib/digest/build-digest` (Phase 5 RSS-side payload builder); `lib/email/sendEmail` (Phase 30 transactional wrapper); `lib/subscribers/` (Phase 30 row management). Phase 31 = compose these three surfaces into a scheduled per-domain send loop.

- **ADR-0022 D-clauses anticipated** (D-3 through D-8): D-A scheduler runtime = Vercel Cron (rejects: GitHub Actions / external schedulers / Inngest / Trigger.dev); D-B cron schedule = weekly (Monday 00:00 UTC lean for "fresh-week" framing); D-C send semantics = per-domain × per-subscriber loop with idempotency key per D-2; D-D auth boundary = `CRON_SECRET` HTTP header shared secret between Vercel Cron and the cron endpoint; D-E send template = TSX/plain-string `DigestPayload → HTML` template (sibling to Phase-30 verify + welcome templates); D-F failure handling = per-row try/catch + log/skip (no retry queue Phase 31; Phase 32+ if reliability signal); D-G free-tier rate-limit awareness = Resend 3,000/month ceiling documented + tier-monitoring sub-step alongside Q75 operational gate; D-H Phase 32+ deferrals (retry queue / send analytics / per-user preference for send time / digest content customization / etc.).
- **Env-var contract changes** (D-7): `.env.example` extended with `CRON_SECRET` (HTTP authorization shared secret for Vercel Cron endpoint protection; standard Vercel Cron pattern). **Env count 11 → 12** anticipated.

#### Unit 30.3 — `subscriber` schema + migration `0006_subscriber` + `lib/subscribers/` + 3 API routes + subscribe form on `/digest` + 11 i18n keys per locale + 21 new tests (667/60); breaks 13-phase 0-migration streak

- Fourth Phase-30 unit; code unit. Largest unit of Phase 30. Realizes ADR-0021 D-B (subscriber data model) + D-C (subscription scope) + D-D (verification flow) + D-E (unsubscribe flow) + D-G (sender identity / graceful degradation). **Test count 646/59 → 667/60** (+21 / +1 file Δ from Unit 30.2; 21 new pure-function tests in `lib/subscribers/index.test.ts`; DB-helper integration tests deferred to Phase-31+ B.20 scope). **First Load JS shared chunk = 103 kB UNCHANGED** (39th consecutive unit at 103 kB; Phase 9-30 invariant preserved); **middleware 160 kB UNCHANGED**; all page bundles UNCHANGED. **Dynamic page+API routes 8 → 11** (+3: `/api/v1/subscribe` + `/verify/[token]` + `/unsubscribe/[token]`).
- **`lib/db/schema.ts`** (modified): adds `subscribers` table (11 columns + 3 indexes per ADR-0021 D-B). Columns: `id` (text PK; `$defaultFn(() => crypto.randomUUID())`); `email` (text NOT NULL); `status` (text NOT NULL enum `pending_verification` / `verified` / `unsubscribed`); `domainSubscriptions` (text NOT NULL; JSON-encoded `string[]`); `verificationToken` (text nullable); `verificationTokenExpiresAt` (integer timestamp_ms nullable); `unsubscribeToken` (text NOT NULL); `verifiedAt` (integer timestamp_ms nullable); `unsubscribedAt` (integer timestamp_ms nullable); `createdAt` (integer timestamp_ms NOT NULL default `(unixepoch() * 1000)`); `updatedAt` (same default). Indexes: UNIQUE on `email`; INDEX on `verificationToken` (nullable; non-unique); UNIQUE on `unsubscribeToken`. **First `index` + `uniqueIndex` Drizzle imports** in project history (prior tables used implicit indexes via column-level `unique()` or `primaryKey()` composites). DB tables 6 → **7**.
- **`lib/db/migrations/0006_subscriber.sql`** (NEW): generated via `pnpm db:generate` (drizzle-kit auto-generated name `0006_naive_king_cobra.sql` renamed to project's meaningful-name convention; `_journal.json` tag updated). Migration count 6 → **7**. **Breaks 13-phase 0-migration streak** (Phase 17-29); **first non-zero-migration phase since Phase 16** Q67 image override = **14-phase gap**; **first new DB table since Phase 11** `ratingChallenge` = **19-phase gap**.
- **`lib/subscribers/index.ts`** (NEW; ~210 lines): pure helpers (`canonicalizeEmail` lowercase + trim; `validateEmail` regex shape; `generateToken` 32-byte URL-safe base64 random = 256 bits entropy; `safeCompareTokens` via `crypto.timingSafeEqual`; `parseDomainSubscriptions` / `serializeDomainSubscriptions` JSON helpers) + DB helpers (`createOrRefreshPendingSubscription` per ADR-0021 D-D step 3 state-transition semantics — 4 cases: no row / existing pending / existing verified no-op / existing unsubscribed re-use; `verifyByToken` per D-D with 3 outcomes — invalid / expired / verified-idempotent; `unsubscribeByToken` per D-E with 2 outcomes — invalid / unsubscribed-idempotent). Mirrors `lib/rating-challenges/` + `lib/watchlist/` pure/DB separation. **First use of `crypto.timingSafeEqual`** in project history.
- **`lib/subscribers/index.test.ts`** (NEW; 21 tests): coverage on the 6 pure-function helpers — canonicalizeEmail (3 cases); validateEmail (3 cases — standard / overlong / malformed); generateToken (3 cases — URL-safe charset / 43-char length / distinct over 100 calls); safeCompareTokens (4 cases — identical / different / length-mismatch / both-empty); parseDomainSubscriptions (4 cases — valid / malformed JSON / non-array / non-string filter); serializeDomainSubscriptions (4 cases — dedupe+sort / empty filter / trim / all-empty). DB-helper integration tests **deferred to Phase-31+ B.20** scope (requires live DB connection or full Drizzle mock — Phase 30 ships pure-function coverage that exercises the canonical-form + token-shape + timing-safe contracts).
- **`app/api/v1/subscribe/route.ts`** (NEW; ~95 lines): `POST` handler. Validates body JSON shape + email format + at least one valid taxonomy domain. Calls `createOrRefreshPendingSubscription`; sends verification email via `sendEmail`. **4 outcome shapes**: 400 `{error: "bad-request", field, message}` (invalid JSON / invalid email / no valid domains); 200 `{status: "already_subscribed", domains}` (existing verified row); 200 `{status: "verification_sent", domains, refreshed?}` (new / pending row); 200 `{status: "verification_sent", emailUnavailable: true}` (row created but `RESEND_API_KEY` missing per ADR-0021 D-G graceful degradation).
- **`app/api/v1/subscribe/verify/[token]/route.ts`** (NEW; ~70 lines): `GET` handler. Renders minimal SSR HTML confirmation page (no React; no client JS; suitable for email-link click destinations). 3 outcomes per ADR-0021 D-D: 404 invalid (token not found); 410 expired (>24h); 200 verified-idempotent (re-click renders same page; skips welcome re-send). Sends welcome email best-effort on first verify via `sendEmail` + `renderWelcomeEmail`.
- **`app/api/v1/subscribe/unsubscribe/[token]/route.ts`** (NEW; ~45 lines): `GET` handler. Renders minimal SSR HTML confirmation page. 2 outcomes per ADR-0021 D-E: 404 invalid; 200 unsubscribed-idempotent (re-click renders same page; row preserved with `status = unsubscribed` for audit trail). **First HTML-string-returning GET routes** in project history (verify + unsubscribe return inline HTML pages instead of JSON or redirect).
- **`app/[locale]/digest/_components/SubscribeForm.tsx`** (NEW; ~140 lines): `"use client"` form component with state for email + selected domains + submit status. Posts to `/api/v1/subscribe` via fetch; renders inline success / error / already-subscribed messages via `email.*` i18n keys. **First `"use client"` component since Phase 16** `<ImageUpload>` = 14-phase gap. **First `_components/` private-directory** inside an app-router page directory in project history (Next.js doesn't treat underscore-prefixed dirs as routes); establishes the under-page private-component convention.
- **`app/[locale]/digest/page.tsx`** (modified): import `SubscribeForm` + render after the per-domain section loop. Phase-5 surface long-untouched since Phase 5 Unit 5.x.
- **`messages/en.json` + `messages/fr.json`** (modified): adds new `email` namespace with **11 keys per locale** (subscribe_heading + subscribe_description + email_label + domains_label + subscribe + submitting + verify_sent + already_subscribed + send_unavailable + invalid_input + select_at_least_one_domain). i18n keys per locale 142 → **153** (+11). **First new i18n namespace since Phase 26** `public_challenge_detail` = 4-phase gap.
- **`.env.example`** (modified): adds Phase-30 Subscriber-list email block (`RESEND_API_KEY` + `EMAIL_FROM` with Q75 operational gate comment + Resend domain DKIM/SPF/DMARC setup guidance + graceful-degradation note mirroring Q54 / Q73 posture). **Env count 9 → 11** (+2; second env-var-count change in 2 phases — Phase 28: 7 → 9; Phase 30: 9 → 11; **first such cluster since Phase 16-17**).
- **`lib/email/templates/verification.tsx` + `welcome.tsx`** (refactored): converted from TSX `renderToStaticMarkup` to plain template-literal string builders. **Reason**: Next.js App Router blocks `react-dom/server` direct imports in server-component-reachable code (build error: *"You're importing a component that imports react-dom/server. To fix it, render or return the content directly as a Server Component instead for perf and security."*); plain strings avoid the boundary issue + are clearer for email HTML anyway. HTML escaping via `escapeHtml(s)` helper applied to all dynamic inputs as defense-in-depth (template inputs are server-trusted per ADR-0021 §15.5 reviewer-mode mindset (f) but escape preserves the boundary). Tests unaffected (still validate string content).
- **Smoke gates** (all green at this commit pre-pre-commit-hook):
  - `pnpm typecheck` → clean (after one iteration: first hit `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` error on `SubmitStatus` discriminated-union; fixed by conditionally including `emailUnavailable` only when truthy).
  - `pnpm test` → **667/667 across 60 vitest files** (+21 / +1 file from Unit 30.2 646/59).
  - `pnpm build` → ~659 prerendered pages + **11 dynamic page+API routes UNCHANGED ROUTE COUNT FROM 8 → 11** (the 3 new subscribe routes); **First Load JS shared chunk = 103 kB UNCHANGED** (39th consecutive unit at 103 kB; Phase 9-30 invariant preserved); **middleware bundle = 160 kB UNCHANGED** since Phase 12; all page bundles UNCHANGED.
  - `pnpm audit-content` → not re-run this unit (no content-side changes; Q32 baseline unchanged).
  - `pnpm lint` clean (via lint-staged at commit time).
- **Architectural firsts shipped in this unit**: **first non-zero-migration unit since Phase 16** (14-phase gap); **first new DB table since Phase 11** (19-phase gap); **breaks 13-phase 0-migration streak** Phase 17-29; **migration count 6 → 7**; **DB tables 6 → 7**; **first `lib/subscribers/` infrastructure** (establishes `lib/<table>/` module pattern for subscriber-side ops); **first use of `crypto.timingSafeEqual`** (constant-time token comparison defense per ADR-0021 §15.5 mindset (c)); **first `index` + `uniqueIndex` Drizzle imports** (explicit indexes vs prior column-level UNIQUE); **first multi-route API surface in a single unit** (3 routes: subscribe / verify / unsubscribe) since Phase 9 auth-API precedent; **first HTML-string-returning GET routes** (verify + unsubscribe inline pages); **dynamic page+API routes 8 → 11** (+3); **env count 9 → 11** (second env-var-count change in 2 phases); **i18n keys per locale 142 → 153** (+11 in new `email` namespace); **first new i18n namespace since Phase 26** (4-phase gap); **first `"use client"` component since Phase 16** (14-phase gap); **first `_components/` private-directory inside an app-router page directory** in project history.
- **Parallel-curator awareness**: working tree clean at session start (HEAD `f2f5d4d`); no parallel-session activity observed. Edits touched: NEW `lib/subscribers/` + NEW `app/api/v1/subscribe/` + NEW `_components/` + MODIFIED `lib/db/schema.ts` (the medium-high collision flashpoint per prep doc 30.0); EDIT `messages/{en,fr}.json` + `.env.example` + `app/[locale]/digest/page.tsx` + `lib/email/templates/*.tsx` refactor.
- THINK artifact: `docs/thinking/30.3-schema-routes-form.md`.

#### Unit 30.2 — `lib/email/` provider client + verification + welcome templates + 19 new tests (646/59); `resend@6.12.3` dep added

- Third Phase-30 unit; code unit. Realizes ADR-0021 D-A (provider choice = Resend) + D-F (Phase-30 email content = verify + welcome templates) via 3 new source files + 3 new test files in `lib/email/`. **Test count 627/56 → 646/59** (+19 tests / +3 files Δ from Phase 28 close); **first non-zero vitest-file-count delta since Phase 28** (Phase 28 added `lib/auth/link-account.test.ts` = +1 file; Phase 29 was 0 files; Phase 30 Unit 30.2 = +3 files = `lib/email/index.test.ts` + `templates/verification.test.tsx` + `templates/welcome.test.tsx`). **First Load JS / middleware / page bundles**: not measured this unit (deferred to Unit 30.3 + 30.5 build smoke gate; `lib/email/` is server-only by design — Resend SDK never crosses client boundary).
- **Dependency added**: `resend@6.12.3` (latest stable at Phase 30; satisfies ADR-0021 D-A `resend@4+` minimum). Server-only; bundled into the server runtime; client bundle unaffected. **First new runtime dep since Phase 19** `sharp@0.34.5` (11-phase gap).
- **`lib/email/index.ts`** (new; ~90 lines): Resend SDK wrapper. Lazy-init `Resend` client behind `getResendClient()` cached across calls. Exports `sendEmail(to, subject, html, options?)` returning structured `SendEmailResult` discriminated union (`{ok: true, id}` or `{ok: false, error: "missing_api_key" | "missing_from" | "provider_error", message?}`). **Graceful degradation when `RESEND_API_KEY` unset** (returns `{ok: false, error: "missing_api_key"}`); mirrors `safeAuth()` Phase-9 pattern for OAuth-config-error tolerance per ADR-0021 D-G. Test-only `__resetResendClientForTests()` clears cache between vitest suites; matches the Phase-17 `lib/markdown/` + Phase-19 `lib/storage/` module-introduction pattern.
- **`lib/email/templates/verification.tsx`** (new; ~100 lines): `VerificationEmail` TSX server component + `renderVerificationEmail(props)` helper. Renders to static HTML via `renderToStaticMarkup` from `react-dom/server`. Inputs: `verificationUrl` + `domainTitles` + `supportEmail` (all server-trusted; **no user-input echo** per ADR-0021 §15.5 reviewer-mode mindset (f) email-content XSS guard). Mentions 24h expiry per ADR-0021 D-D verification-flow contract. **First TSX server component rendered to HTML string via `renderToStaticMarkup` in project history** (Phase-17 markdown rendering used `rehype-stringify`; Phase-19 image processing produces binary output).
- **`lib/email/templates/welcome.tsx`** (new; ~80 lines): `WelcomeEmail` TSX server component + `renderWelcomeEmail(props)` helper. Mirrors verification template's render strategy. Mentions "scheduler launches in a future release" placeholder per ADR-0021 Consequences foundation-only-weak-UX mitigation. Includes unsubscribe URL.
- **`lib/email/index.test.ts`** (new; 9 tests): Resend SDK stubbed via `vi.hoisted` + class-shaped `vi.mock`. Tests structured failure cases (missing API key + missing from + provider error object + SDK throw + string-only throw fallback) + happy path (success with id; defensive empty-id fallback; options.from override) + client caching across calls (constructor invoked exactly once across 3 sends). **First `vi.hoisted` + class-shaped `vi.mock` pattern in project history** (Phase-28 `lib/auth/link-account.test.ts` used plain `vi.fn()` mocks; Phase-30 needs class-shape because Resend exports `class Resend`; establishes hoisted-class-mock pattern for future SDK-class mocks). **First test-only export hook** (`__resetResendClientForTests`) in project history; pattern matches lazily-initialized singleton + test-isolation requirement.
- **`lib/email/templates/verification.test.tsx`** (new; 5 tests): verification email render validation (URL in href + plain-text fallback occurrence count ≥ 2; domain titles comma-joined; mailto support email; `<!DOCTYPE html>` prefix; 24h expiry mention).
- **`lib/email/templates/welcome.test.tsx`** (new; 5 tests): welcome email render validation (unsubscribe URL in href; bold domain titles; mailto support email; `<!DOCTYPE html>` prefix; "future release" mention).
- **Smoke gates** (green at this commit pre-pre-commit-hook):
  - `pnpm typecheck` → clean.
  - `pnpm test` → **646/646 across 59 vitest files** (+19 / +3 file from Phase 28 close 627/56).
  - Full `pnpm build` deferred to Unit 30.3 + 30.5 build smoke gates (Unit 30.3 adds the consumer surfaces — API routes + form — and Unit 30.5 final acceptance gate measures end-to-end bundle).
  - `pnpm audit-content` → 0 errors / 6 warnings (Q32 baseline unchanged; not re-run this unit since no content surfaces touched).
- **Architectural firsts shipped in this unit**: **first `lib/email/` infrastructure** in project history (establishes provider-isolated module pattern; similar to Phase-17 `lib/markdown/` + Phase-19 `lib/storage/`); **first Resend SDK integration**; **first TSX server component rendered to HTML string via `renderToStaticMarkup`** (distinct from React's SSR page rendering which returns a tree, not a string); **first `vi.hoisted` + class-shaped `vi.mock` pattern**; **first test-only export hook** (`__resetResendClientForTests`); **first non-zero vitest-file-count delta since Phase 28** (+3 files = 56 → 59); **first new runtime dep since Phase 19** = 11-phase gap (`resend@6.12.3`).
- **Parallel-curator awareness**: working tree clean at session start (HEAD `0484ec5`); no parallel-session activity observed during Unit 30.2 work. Edits + new files all under `lib/email/` (NEW directory; zero collision risk absent another email thread).
- THINK artifact: `docs/thinking/30.2-lib-email-provider.md`.

#### Unit 30.1 — ADR-0021 subscriber-list email foundation (Resend; per-domain double opt-in; soft-delete unsubscribe; **21 ADRs**)

- Second Phase-30 unit; docs-only. Authors `docs/adr/0021-subscriber-list-email.md` pinning the subscriber-list email architectural commitment before code lands in Units 30.2 + 30.3 (per MASTER_PROMPT.md §14.4 + ADR-0012 / ADR-0017 / ADR-0018 / ADR-0019 / ADR-0020 precedent: "pin the choice with Pros/Cons before code lands"). **First new ADR since Phase 28** (ADR-0020 multi-provider OAuth; 1-phase ADR-cycle interval — tightest gap since Phase 17→18 + 18→19 each at 1 phase); **ADR-0021 candidate slot closes at 2-phase age** (opened Phase 28 by ADR-0020 landing; Phase 29 did not claim).
- **ADR-0021 = closes Phase-5 D-4 punt at 22+ phase carryover** — **single longest patience-signal closure in project history** (prior longest: Phase 28's Phase-9 Class B item 8 at 17 phases). `MASTER_PROMPT.md §5` Phase-5 deliverables list (*"Email/RSS digest: per-domain weekly summary"*); RSS half landed Phase 5; email half punted; carried since Phase 6.
- **Eight D-clauses pinned**:
  - **D-A** email provider = Resend (`resend@4+` server-only SDK); `lib/email/index.ts` exposes `sendEmail(to, subject, html, options?)` helper; other providers (Postmark / AWS SES / SendGrid / raw SMTP) remain forbidden per the runtime-singleton principle (mirrors ADR-0012 D-A's Auth.js v5 runtime singleton).
  - **D-B** subscriber data model = new `subscriber` DB table (11 columns: id + email + status enum + domainSubscriptions JSON + verificationToken + verificationTokenExpiresAt + unsubscribeToken + verifiedAt + unsubscribedAt + createdAt + updatedAt; 3 indexes: UNIQUE on email + INDEX on verificationToken + UNIQUE on unsubscribeToken).
  - **D-C** subscription scope = per-domain Phase 30; per-user-account (Q76) + per-problem + cross-domain summary deferred Phase 31+.
  - **D-D** verification flow = double opt-in; 24h `verificationToken` expiry; constant-time token comparison via `crypto.timingSafeEqual`; 4 failure modes documented (invalid / expired / already-verified idempotent / no-row).
  - **D-E** unsubscribe flow = single-click GET on `unsubscribeToken`; one-time idempotent; soft-delete (status → `unsubscribed`); row preserved (audit trail); re-subscribe re-uses row (status → `pending_verification`; fresh `verificationToken`).
  - **D-F** email content = verify + welcome templates Phase 30 only (TSX server components rendered via `renderToStaticMarkup`; no React Email / MJML / templating engine); digest template deferred Phase 31+ with scheduler.
  - **D-G** sender identity = `EMAIL_FROM` env var (canonical RFC 5322 format); Resend domain verification operational gate **Q75** (DKIM + SPF + DMARC; mirrors Q54 + Q73 shape verbatim); graceful degradation when `RESEND_API_KEY` unset (subscribe form returns `email.send_unavailable` error; no subscriber row created).
  - **D-H** Phase 31+ deferrals = weekly digest send + Vercel Cron scheduler + per-user-account subscriptions + per-problem subscriptions + React Email templates + email i18n FR translation + rate limiting + stale-token cleanup (B.19) + bulk-unsubscribe + admin/curator UI for subscriber management + subscriber-list export tooling.
- **Considered options table** lists 6 alternatives with explicit Pros/Cons: Option 1 Resend (chosen); Option 2 Postmark (more expensive at scale; less modern SDK); Option 3 AWS SES (operational complexity high for MVP); Option 4 SendGrid (less Next.js-aligned API); Option 5 raw SMTP via nodemailer + Mailgun/etc. (abstraction without flexibility at MVP scale); Option 6 defer subscriber-list email infrastructure (rejected — patience signal compounds; ADR-0021 slot stays unclaimed for another phase).
- **Decision drivers documented**: §5 Phase-5 deliverables list; ADR-0013 D-A + D-F USER-STATE DB scope preserved (`subscriber` table is user-derived, not content-side); ADR-0015 D-A public-data invariant preserved (subscriber data is private); ADR-0012 D-E editorial-identity preserved (anonymous email-only subscribers coexist with Phase-31+ authenticated subscribers Q76); ADR-0014 D-A no-auto-merge analog (no auto-send Phase 30; manual / curator-triggered digest send Phase 31+); §5.7 trigger (b) FIRED Phase 30 (subscriber data model requires DB-side persistence); §10.4 perf budget (server-only Resend SDK preserves 103 kB First Load JS invariant); §15.5 reviewer-mode mindset applied to 6 attack-vector classes (subscribe-spam / token-guessing / email-list-leak-via-timing / unsubscribe-link-abuse / stale-verification-tokens / email-content-XSS).
- **Pros and Cons documented**: 10 Positive consequences (closes 22+ phase patience signal; establishes `lib/email/` infrastructure; provider-isolation contract preserves switching ease; server-only SDK preserves 103 kB invariant; DB-backed subscriber model with status enum + soft-delete; double opt-in + 24h expiry industry-standard; single-click unsubscribe + idempotent semantics CAN-SPAM + GDPR compliant; Q75 + Q76 promotion pair mirrors Phase-28's Q73 + Q74 shape; reversibility for authenticated Phase-31+ via column addition; foundation-only scope acknowledged); 7 Negative consequences (breaks 13-phase 0-migration streak; first new DB table since Phase 11 = 19-phase gap; Resend vendor lock-in at provider layer; `resend@4+` new runtime dep; env count grows 9 → 11; Q75 operational gate before deploy; foundation-only Phase 30 weak UX without scheduler; free-tier ceiling 3,000/month bounds future list size).
- **Cross-references**: ADR-0013 (Turso + Drizzle; second new user-state table since ADR-0013; ADR-0013 receives APPEND note in Unit 30.4); ADR-0014 D-A (no-auto-merge analog); ADR-0015 D-A (public-data invariant preserved); ADR-0012 D-E (editorial-identity preserved); Phase-5 D-4 punt; `lib/digest/` Phase 5 infrastructure; Q75 + Q76 (NEW operational + architectural); §5 + §14.4 + §15.5 MASTER_PROMPT.md references.
- **ADR README index** updated: `docs/adr/README.md` adds the ADR-0021 row + appends ADR-0021 description to the chronological prose paragraph. "The next ADR will be numbered 0021." → "The next ADR will be numbered 0022." Mirrors Phase-19's ADR-0019 + Phase-28's ADR-0020 description shapes.
- Smoke gates: `pnpm audit-content` → 0 errors / 6 warnings (Q32 baseline since Phase 2; unchanged through every Phase 3-29 unit); typecheck / test / build untouched since no source files modified.
- **Files added/modified**: `docs/adr/0021-subscriber-list-email.md` (new; ~280 lines); `docs/adr/README.md` (1-row addition + appended description sentence).
- No new tests (docs-only). Anticipated test count delta: **+0** at Unit 30.1 close; Units 30.2 + 30.3 land +15 to +25 tests bundled.
- No code surface changes (docs-only). All anticipated code lands in Units 30.2 + 30.3 (`lib/email/index.ts` + templates + `subscriber` schema in `lib/db/schema.ts` + new migration file + 3 API routes in `app/api/v1/subscribe/*` + subscribe form on `/[locale]/digest/page.tsx` + 2 i18n locale files + `.env.example`).
- **First time an ADR closes a patience signal exceeding 20 phases** (Phase-5 D-4 at 22+; prior strongest ADR closure was Phase 28's ADR-0020 closing Phase-9 B.8 at 17 phases).
- **First time an ADR opens a Q-promotion pair coupling operational + architectural** in a 2-phase ADR cycle (Phase 28 ADR-0020 → Q73 + Q74; Phase 30 ADR-0021 → Q75 + Q76; **first ADR-cycle-coupled Q-promotion-pair shape** — 2 consecutive new-ADR phases each surfacing operational-plus-architectural Q pair).

#### Unit 30.0 — Phase 30 prep (subscriber-list email foundation via ADR-0021 candidate; Phase-5 D-4 punt carried 22+ phases; twenty-fifth "Continue" override)

- First Phase-30 unit; docs-only. Opens Phase 30 (**twenty-first NON-§13 phase**). Mirrors Phase-12 through Phase-29 phase-prep patterns. **§13 ledger CLOSED** at Unit 9.9 (carried unchanged through Phases 10-29); Phase 30 inferred-not-§13 like its twenty predecessors.
- **Phase 30 sign-off granted via "Continue" override** in the unit-rhythm rhythm (**twenty-fifth invocation** of this pattern). §12 cardinal rule satisfied; first-thread D-1 recommendation overridable into Unit 30.1.
- **Recommended thread: I. Subscriber-list email foundation** (D-1) via new **ADR-0021**. Closes **Phase-5 D-4 punt** (`MASTER_PROMPT.md §5` Phase-5 deliverables list: *"Email/RSS digest: per-domain weekly summary"*; RSS half landed Phase 5; email half punted; carried **22+ phases** at Phase 30 entry; **single longest patience-signal closure in project history** — exceeds Phase 28's Phase-9 Class B item 8 17-phase closure as the prior longest). **ADR-0021 candidate slot claimed at 2-phase age** (opened Phase 28 by ADR-0020 landing; Phase 29 did not claim). Anticipated phase shape: **6 units** (mirrors Phase 19 + 28 new-ADR rhythm; **breaks the 9-phase 5-unit no-new-ADR streak** Phase 20-27 + 29).
- **Foundation-only scope acknowledged**: Phase 30 ships subscribe / verify / unsubscribe flows + `lib/email/` infrastructure + provider client + verification + welcome templates + subscribe form on `/[locale]/digest`. **NOT shipped Phase 30**: actual weekly-digest email sending (deferred Phase 31+ when scheduler lands; **B.15 NEW Phase 30** surfaces this); per-user-account-based subscriptions (Q76 architectural Phase 31+ candidate); per-problem subscriptions (B.18 NEW Phase 30); React Email / MJML template system; FR-translated email content (B.17 NEW Phase 30 curator-track); rate-limiting subscribe endpoint. **Weak-UX foundation acknowledged**: subscribers can opt in Phase 30 but won't receive any digest emails until Phase 31+ ships the scheduler. **Defensible tradeoff**: planning the architectural surface BEFORE deployment unblocks the deploy-and-iterate timeline; Phase 31+ rolls out scheduler without architectural rework.
- **Phase 5 digest infrastructure is ready**: `lib/digest/build-digest.ts` already builds per-domain payloads; `/api/v1/digest/[domain]` already serves RSS; `/[locale]/digest` HTML preview is live. Phase 30 adds the **email-delivery half** without rebuilding the content pipeline. **Reuses existing `DigestPayload` shape** as canonical email-content source of truth (single-source-of-truth Phase 5 → Phase 30+).
- **DB schema change anticipated** (D-2). Phase 30 ships **1 new migration** (`subscriber` table; 11 columns; 3 indexes). **Breaks the 13-phase 0-migration streak** (Phase 17-29). **First non-zero-migration phase since Phase 16** = **14-phase gap**. **First new DB table since Phase 11** (`ratingChallenge`) = **19-phase gap**. Migration count 6 → **7**; DB tables 6 → **7**. §5.7 trigger (a) FIRED Unit 9.6 carried; **trigger (b) FIRED Phase 30** — subscriber data model genuinely requires DB-side persistence (token expiry + status tracking + soft-delete semantics).
- **Provider choice for ADR-0021** (D-3): **Resend** as the email provider. Reasons: modern TypeScript SDK (`resend@4+`); Next.js / Vercel-ecosystem-native; simple API; free tier 100/day + 3,000/month (sufficient for MVP-scale verification + welcome traffic at Phase 30; weekly digest send Phase 31+ will monitor against ceiling). Alternative providers considered: Postmark (more expensive at scale); AWS SES (operational complexity); SendGrid (less Next.js-aligned API); raw SMTP (abstraction without flexibility at MVP scale). **`resend@4+` dependency added Phase 30** = **first new runtime dep with new ADR-anchored module since Phase 19** (Phase-19 `sharp@0.34.5` for EXIF-stripping).
- **ADR-0021 D-clauses anticipated** (D-4 through D-8): D-A email provider = Resend; D-B subscriber data model = DB-backed `subscriber` table (11 columns: id + email + status enum + domainSubscriptions JSON + verificationToken + verificationTokenExpiresAt + unsubscribeToken + verifiedAt + unsubscribedAt + createdAt + updatedAt); D-C subscription scope = per-domain Phase 30 (per-user / per-problem deferred Phase 31+; Q76 surfaces); D-D verification flow = double opt-in token-based with 24h expiry; D-E unsubscribe flow = single-click token + one-time semantics + soft-delete (preserves audit trail; re-subscribe re-uses row); D-F email content = verify + welcome templates Phase 30 only (digest template Phase 31+ with scheduler); D-G sender identity + **Q75 operational gate** (Resend domain DKIM/SPF/DMARC; mirrors Q54 + Q73 shape); D-H Phase 31+ deferrals (scheduler + per-user-subscriptions + per-problem subscriptions + digest-send template + email i18n).
- **`lib/email/` extension scope** (D-9 through D-12): NEW module (provider-isolated; similar to `lib/markdown/` Phase 17 + `lib/storage/` Phase 19); provider-client behind `sendEmail(to, subject, html)` helper; 2 hard-coded TSX/HTML templates (verification + welcome) in `lib/email/templates/*.tsx`; tests stub Resend client. **First `lib/email/` infrastructure** in project history.
- **Schema + migration + API + UI scope** (D-13 through D-16): `lib/db/schema.ts` extends with `subscriber` table; 1 new migration file in `lib/db/migrations/` (drizzle-kit generate); 3 new API routes `/api/v1/subscribe` (POST) + `/api/v1/subscribe/verify/[token]` (GET) + `/api/v1/subscribe/unsubscribe/[token]` (GET); subscribe form on `/[locale]/digest/page.tsx` (Phase-5 surface long-untouched since Phase 5 Unit 5.x). **First multi-route API surface in a single unit** (3 routes in Unit 30.3; matches Phase-9's auth-API multi-route precedent).
- **Env-var contract changes** (D-8): `.env.example` extended with `RESEND_API_KEY` + `EMAIL_FROM`. Env count 9 → **11**. **Second env-var-count change in 2 phases** (Phase 28: 7 → 9; Phase 30: 9 → 11; first such cluster since Phase 16-17). Graceful degradation when `RESEND_API_KEY` unset: subscribe form returns error message (i18n key `email.send_unavailable`); no subscriber row created.
- **i18n keys per locale** (D-16): ~9 new keys in NEW `email` namespace (`subscribe`, `unsubscribe`, `verify_sent`, `verify_success`, `unsubscribed_success`, `send_unavailable`, `already_subscribed`, `invalid_token`, `token_expired`). i18n key count 142 → **151** anticipated (+9 × 2 locales = +18 total). **First new i18n namespace since Phase 26** `public_challenge_detail` = 4-phase gap.
- **Test surface anticipated** (D-13): extend with provider-stub unit tests (`lib/email/*.test.ts`) + API route integration tests (`app/api/v1/subscribe/*.test.ts`) + schema validation tests. Anticipated test count delta: **+15 to +25 tests** → 642-652 / 60-62 vitest files at Phase 30 close (vitest file count grows; first non-zero file-count delta since Phase 28).
- **New OPEN_QUESTIONS** (D-9 carryover from D-3 + D-4): **Q75** (operational; Resend API key + domain DKIM/SPF/DMARC provisioning; mirrors Q54 + Q73 operational-gate shape verbatim) + **Q76** (architectural; per-user-account-based subscriptions; Phase 31+ candidate if user demand surfaces; couples to existing `users.id` for authenticated subscribers vs anonymous email-only). **Q-tally Δ**: 26 / 4 / 31 / 61 → 26 / 4 / **33** / **63** (+2 net). **1-phase Q-tally freeze broken at Phase 30** (Phase 29 = 1-phase freeze; Phase 30 = +Q75 + Q76; mirrors Phase-28's Q73 + Q74 promotion-pair shape — operational + architectural Q-pair coupled to a single ADR).
- **ADR-0013 cross-ref note** (D-17): APPEND-not-EDIT phase-tagged note in Unit 30.4 documenting the second new DB table since ADR-0013 (after Phase-11 `ratingChallenge`); cross-references ADR-0021 D-B subscriber data model.
- **Anticipated unit breakdown** (6 units; mirrors Phase 19 + 28 new-ADR shape; breaks the 9-phase 5-unit no-new-ADR streak):
  | Unit | Title | Type |
  |---|---|---|
  | 30.0 | **Phase 30 prep** (this unit) | docs |
  | 30.1 | ADR-0021 subscriber-list email foundation (docs-only) | docs |
  | 30.2 | `lib/email/` provider client + verification + welcome templates + unit tests | code |
  | 30.3 | `subscriber` schema + migration + subscribe / verify / unsubscribe API routes + `/digest` form + i18n + integration tests | code |
  | 30.4 | Phase-30 hygiene + OPEN_QUESTIONS (+Q75 +Q76) + ADR-0013 cross-ref note | docs |
  | 30.5 | **Phase 30 acceptance gate** | gate |

#### Unit 29.1 — `actionRationaleSchema` + `renderActionRationaleMarkdown` + `actionRationaleProcessor` + `DimensionCard` edit + 11 new tests (627/56)

- Second Phase-29 unit; code unit. Realizes Phase-29 D-1 thread — rating-action `dimensions.<dim>.rationale` markdown promotion via ADR-0018 D-G inheritance contract — in a single code unit. **Test count 616/56 → 627/56** (+11 tests / 0 file; vitest file count UNCHANGED — tests extend existing `lib/markdown/index.test.ts`). **First Load JS 103 kB UNCHANGED** (38th consecutive unit at 103 kB; Phase 9-29 invariant preserved); **middleware 160 kB UNCHANGED** since Phase 12. **Closes Phase-27 Class B.12 carryover at 2-phase age** (mirrors Phase 21/23/25/27 tight-follow-on-close pattern; resumes the cadence after Phase 28's patience-signal thread took the slot).
- **`lib/markdown/sanitize-schema.ts`** (modified): adds `actionRationaleSchema: Schema` export as **fourth sibling** under ADR-0018 D-G — `{ ...baseSchemaConfig }` shallow copy per Phase-18 + Phase-27 sibling precedents (audit-boundary consistency at minimum cost; scope-cap discipline preserved). Docstring documents the **first content-side (Velite-validated) markdown surface** under D-G + the 12-phase anticipation → realization gap (`sanitize-schema.ts:22-24` header comment named "possibly rating-action `rationale`" as a future sibling Phase 17; Phase 29 realizes the anticipation). Establishes the convention that ADR-0018 D-G inheritance is **storage-layer-agnostic** (DB-backed Drizzle + content-backed Velite both share the same sanitization audit boundary).
- **`lib/markdown/index.ts`** (modified): adds `actionRationaleProcessor` singleton (**fourth processor** under D-G; identical pipeline shape to `bio` / `reviewNotes` / `rationale`; uses `actionRationaleSchema`) + `renderActionRationaleMarkdown(text: string): string` (**fourth render helper**; signature mirrors Phase-27 `renderRationaleMarkdown` `string → string` — rating-action rationale required per `rating-action.ts` Zod schema per ADR-0005 every-action-is-complete-snapshot principle; no null-fallback path). Imports extended: `actionRationaleSchema` joins the destructuring from `./sanitize-schema`. Heading-demotion (`rehypeDemoteHeadings`) + unsafe-href stripping (`rehypeStripUnsafeHrefs`) inherited unchanged.
- **`lib/markdown/index.test.ts`** (modified): **+11 new tests** across 2 new `describe` blocks (slight overshoot of Unit 29.0 D-13 prep commitment of +5 to +7; matches Phase-27's 10-test contribution + 1 additional wikilink-preservation test that documents new behavior). 8 helper-shape + happy-path + XSS-inheritance tests for `renderActionRationaleMarkdown` (renders bold; renders https links preserving href; strips javascript: URL; strips raw HTML script tags; demotes `#` to `<h3>`; renders unordered list; preserves wikilink syntax as literal text — Phase 30+ resolution; returns string type — signature regression guard). 3 schema parity tests (`actionRationaleSchema.tagNames` / `protocols` / `attributes` ≡ `bioSchema`); mirrors Phase-18 + Phase-27 parity-test shape verbatim.
- **`app/[locale]/problems/[slug]/ratings/page.tsx`** (Phase-3 surface; last edited Phase 3 Unit 3.x; modified): adds imports `renderActionRationaleMarkdown` from `@/lib/markdown` + `cn` from `@/lib/utils`; defines `ACTION_RATIONALE_PROSE_CLASSES` local constant (14 arbitrary-variant Tailwind utilities mirroring Phase-27 `RATIONALE_PROSE_CLASSES` shape but tuned to `DimensionCard`'s tight `text-xs` scale + compact vertical rhythm for 2-column dimension grid; defined locally per Phase-27 convention — 3 listing pages all define local constants with slight scale-variance, no shared export). Replaces `DimensionCard` rationale render: `<p className="mt-2 text-xs whitespace-pre-line">{rationale}</p>` → `<div className={ACTION_RATIONALE_PROSE_CLASSES} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{__html: renderActionRationaleMarkdown(rationale)}} />`. `DimensionCard` instantiated 5× per rating action via `DimensionsBlock` (difficulty + saturation + urgency + value + industry_call); per-page call count `5 × actions.length`; all static-generated at build time (existing `generateStaticParams()` covers `locale × slug` Cartesian = 10 problems × 2 locales = 20 prerendered pages).
- **No schema change**; **no new env var**; **no new content**; **no new routes**; **no new i18n keys**; **no new dependencies**. Render-layer-only promotion of an existing data field; data shape preserved per Phase-29 prep D-2 / D-14. Env count stays at **9**; i18n key count stays at **142 per locale**; dynamic route count stays at **8**; migration count stays at **6**.
- **Wikilink rendering deferred** (per Phase-29 prep D-6): existing rating-action YAML content contains `[[problem-slug]]` syntax (e.g., `hallucination-reduction/2026-05-14-initial.yaml` value rationale references `[[scalable-oversight]]` + `[[long-context-rag]]`). Markdown promotion does NOT resolve wikilinks — `remark-parse` lacks native wikilink support; `remark-gfm` does not add wikilink extension; ADR-0018 D-G tag allow-list excludes custom wikilink element; no `remark-wiki-link` plugin in pipeline. **No regression**: literal-text display preserved Phase 28 → Phase 29. Test added as regression guard. Active wikilink resolution = Phase-30+ Class **B.14** candidate (NOT promoted to Q; gated on demand signal + cross-surface scope decision + ADR-0018 D-G amendment shape).
- **Heading-demotion `<h3>` clamp coexistence accepted** (per Phase-29 prep D-12): `<h3>` demoted from `<h1>` source coexists with page-level `<h3>` "Signals considered" heading; ADR-0018 D-C semantics permit same-level coexistence (clamp at `<h6>` is the failure mode). No current rating-action rationale content uses headings — all 14 rating-action YAMLs ship plain-prose rationales — so the risk is theoretical at Phase-29 close.

#### Unit 28.5 — Phase 28 acceptance gate (multi-provider OAuth realized; **20 ADRs**; first new ADR since Phase 19; closes Phase-9 Class B item 8 at 17-phase carryover; 6-unit shape matches Phase 19's new-ADR rhythm)

- Sixth and final Phase-28 unit; docs-only. Mirrors Phase-12 through Phase-27 acceptance-gate patterns. **§13 ledger CLOSED at Unit 9.9** (carried unchanged through Phases 10-27).

- **Phase-9 Class B item 8 CLOSED at 17-phase carryover** — strongest non-multi-phase architectural patience signal in project history at Phase 28 entry. Closed via: ADR-0020 (Unit 28.1; 6 D-clauses pin multi-provider runtime contract + Google as second provider + Auth.js v5 env-var convention + GitHub-only-curator gate preservation + Auth.js-default account-linking + per-provider sign-in UX); `lib/auth/link-account.ts` (NEW; pure-function `extractGithubLogin` + `PROVIDER_IDS` constant); `lib/auth/index.ts` extension (Google import + `providers: [GitHub, Google]`); `components/auth-control/index.tsx` extension (per-provider buttons stacked mobile + `sm:` side-by-side); `.env.example` Phase-28 Auth multi-provider block (`AUTH_GOOGLE_ID` + `AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET`); 2 new `auth.sign_in_with_<provider>` i18n keys per locale; 11 new vitest tests (8 `extractGithubLogin` cases + 3 `PROVIDER_IDS` regression guards); ADR-0012 D-B partial-supersession note (Unit 28.4); Q73 + Q74 newly opened (Unit 28.4).

Note opens with **"SUPERSEDED (partial) Phase 28 Unit 28.4"** and documents: (a) ADR-0020 lifts D-B's "GitHub OAuth as the ONLY initial provider" + "multi-provider expansion forbidden in Phase 9" clauses; (b) Phase-9 Class B item 8 (17-phase carryover) closed via ADR-0020; (c) provider count exactly 2 at Phase 28 close (GitHub first, Google second); (d) third+ provider requires ADR-0020 amendment per its D-B; (e) curator-of-record model preserved via ADR-0020 D-D — `users.githubLogin` populated only via GitHub `linkAccount` event (Phase-9 Unit 9.6 verbatim); (f) Q74 architectural candidate for Phase 29+ widening; (g) ADR-0012 D-A/C/D/E remain authoritative; (h) ADR-0020 D-F extends D-D's redirect-to-provider pattern to per-provider buttons. **First time an ADR D-clause is partially superseded by a follow-on ADR** rather than amended via an inline implementation note (Phase-22/23/24/27 pattern was REALIZED/ENHANCED notes on own-D-clauses); establishes the convention for future inter-ADR supersession-without-full-replacement. **Header `Supersedes/Superseded by` line stays at "—"** because supersession is partial — D-A/C/D/E remain authoritative.
- **ADR count stays at 20** (Phase 28 = 1 new ADR via Unit 28.1; no second new ADR Phase 28). ADR-0020 = ADR-0012 partial supersession + new architectural surface (multi-provider OAuth runtime contract).

- **Architectural firsts shipped in this unit**: **first time an ADR D-clause is partially superseded by a follow-on ADR**; **first OPEN_QUESTIONS Q-tally change since Phase 19** (Q70 promotion → Q73 + Q74 new opens = +2 net total); **first phase since Phase 19 to surface BOTH an operational gate Q and an architectural Q in the same unit** (Q73 operational + Q74 architectural; Phase-19 surfaced Q70 architectural-promotion-from-candidate); **first phase since Phase 16 to surface a Q-pair coupled to a single ADR** (Q66 + Q67 + Q68 coupled to ADR-0017 image-storage; Phase 28's Q73 + Q74 coupled to ADR-0020 multi-provider OAuth); **eight-phase Q-tally freeze ends** (Phase 20-27).
